chunks.title: Naomi's Plan for Ruth
chunks.reason: Naomi instructs Ruth on how to approach Boaz and Ruth agrees.

chunks.title: Ruth at the Threshing Floor
chunks.reason: Narrative of Ruth's actions at the threshing floor and Boaz's response.

chunks.title: Ruth Reports to Naomi
chunks.reason: Ruth returns to Naomi and they discuss the outcome of the meeting.
